en: Ryan is celebrating his first Christmas with his beautiful new wife Cheryl

en: Oh that's so sweet So whenever you're ready take it away
Carol you know what the best gift I got this year was What Brian You Oh my God Well
I got you something You got me a present Yes I thought we weren't getting anything for each other this year Well that's what we say but

en: you're still supposed to get each other something I didn't know that Why did you say that then I feel bad What is it
